commands.review_summary:
The branch guards single-row child-session metadata indexing against missing stores and refreshes Talk launch-options and compaction-rotation tests for current UI/runtime types.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +5. Total +11 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows the single-row child-session candidate builder calls Object.entries on the store, and the PR proof reports the focused gateway shard passing after the nullish-store guard; I did not run tests locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed; the remaining action is maintainer review and landing for a clean protected-label PR.

target.title: fix(ci): repair current main checks
target.body:
## Summary

- tolerates missing session-store maps while building single-row child-session candidate indexes
- prevents `chat.history` / session-info paths from throwing when a caller has no loaded store but still asks for child-session metadata
- updates the stale Talk launch-options UI test to exercise the current custom Talk select controls instead of removed native `<select>` controls
- tightens the compaction-rotation attempt mock/result fixture types so the current core test typecheck passes

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/agent-command.compaction-rotation.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts --reporter=dot`: passed 3 shards / 178 tests on current branch after rebasing onto `origin/main` `015c6b40aea`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-command.compaction-rotation.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`: passed
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/agent-command.compaction-rotation.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts`: passed
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed
- AWS Crabbox: `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label main-ci-repair-rebased-check-changed --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` (`provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_a6fbd8a6a9db`, `slug=blue-barnacle-a87c`, `run=run_4c637cf49fd6`, exit 0)
- GitHub PR checks on head `8d5ea60e441bf96be557200682d7f9d76098b49b`: passed; latest poll reported no failed or running checks

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: the gateway no longer throws `Cannot convert undefined or null to object` while building single-row child-session candidates for session-info paths that do not have a loaded store, and the current Talk launch-options plus compaction-rotation test drift no longer block CI.

Real environment tested: linked OpenClaw gwt worktree `fix-main-ci-blockers-20260601` rebased onto current `origin/main`, AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate proof, and GitHub PR CI on the pushed head.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: reran the focused session-utils regression file, compaction-rotation test, full chat view test file, formatter, lint, diff check, remote `pnpm check:changed`, and GitHub PR checks.

Evidence after fix: the focused gateway shard passed 104 tests; the compaction-rotation shard passed 3 tests; the chat view shard passed 71 tests including the previously failing Talk launch-options test; AWS Crabbox changed gate selected `core` and `coreTests` and exited 0; GitHub PR checks are green.

Observed result after fix: missing stores produce an empty child-session candidate map instead of throwing, valid store callers keep the same candidate and context-token behavior, the Talk launch-options test now exercises the shipped custom select controls, and the compaction-rotation fixture now matches the runtime attempt/result types.

What was not tested: full repository suite locally.
target.author: vincentkoc
